page_metadata.biotools__summary: Given a matrix of coordinates, this tool constructs the communities to sample the data points. Then, it builds a graph and after weighting the edges by conductance computation, the graph is passed to a classic spectral clustering algorithm to find and combine the spectral clusters. The resulting connected components estimate biological cell populations in the data sample.

The resulting connected components estimate biological cell populations in the data sample.
